---
title: "GLMM"
format: html
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse) # version 2.0.0
library(sf) #1.0-21
library(here) #1.0.1
library(janitor) #2.2.1
library(stars) #0.6-8
library(terra) #1.8-42
library(glmmTMB) #1.1.14
library(arcgislayers)

source(here("R", "spatial_join.R"))
source(here('R', 'rich_gini.R'))
```

```{r}

birds_rich <- gini_simpson(birds_joined)

birds_rich <- birds_rich %>% 
  mutate(protection = ifelse(gap_sts %in% c(1,2), 'Protected', 'Non-protected'))

habitats <- unique(birds_rich$habitat_type)
tmp <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)
bird_summary <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)

for (i in habitats){
  
  tmp[[i]] <- birds_rich %>% 
    st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    filter(habitat_type == i)
  
  
  bird_summary[[i]] <- summary(glmmTMB(rich_gini ~ protection, family = beta_family(), data = tmp[[i]]))
}


```




```{r}
tmp <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)
bird_summary <- vector(mode = 'list', length = 0)

for (i in habitats){
  
  tmp[[i]] <- birds_rich %>% 
    st_drop_geometry() %>% 
    filter(habitat_type == i)
  
  
  bird_summary[[i]] <- glmmTMB(rich_gini ~ gap_sts, family = beta_family(), data = tmp[[i]])
}

table_list <- lapply(bird_summary, tbl_regression, exponentiate = TRUE)

# 3. Merge the tables together
final_table <- tbl_merge(
  tbls = table_list,
  tab_spanner = c(habitats)
)

# 4. Convert to gt object for further customization
final_gt <- final_table %>%
  as_gt() 

# Display table
final_gt
```
